name: Avelo Airlines

carryOn.notes: One carry-on included with every fare. Personal item also included.

economy.notes: $35 per checked bag when booked online. $40 at the airport.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Avelo charge for carry-on bags?
faqs.answer: No, Avelo includes one carry-on bag and one personal item for all passengers at no extra charge.

faqs.question: How much does Avelo charge for checked bags?
faqs.answer: Checked bags cost $35 when booked online or $40 at the airport. Weight limit is 50 lbs per bag.
